channel.title: Aeropress on Barista At Home
channel.description: Recent content in Aeropress on Barista At Home

item.title: Coffee Grind Size Guide: Chart for Every Brewing Method
item.description: The complete coffee grind size reference — espresso, pour over, French press, AeroPress, cold brew, drip, and moka pot. Includes a full comparison chart and troubleshooting tips.

item.title: AeroPress Guide: How to Use It + Best Recipes for a Perfect Cup
item.description: Everything you need to know about the AeroPress: how it works, step-by-step instructions, the best AeroPress recipe for beginners, and tips for experimenting with your brew.

item.title: Pour Over Coffee Ratio Guide: Drip, V60, Chemex, AeroPress & More
item.description: The standard pour over coffee ratio is 1:15 to 1:17 (1g coffee per 15-17g water). Here are the exact ratios for every manual brewing method, plus tips for dialing in your cup.
